basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) Faculty Positions Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Jammu. Applications are invited for Faculty Positions including Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor Grade I, and Assistant Professor Grade II under the IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in the preceding degrees with throughout consistently good academic record.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay scale as per 7th CPC, with levels ranging from 10 to 14A.
salary_details.details: Professor: Academic Pay Level 14 A (Rs. 159100-220200) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 159100/- per month Associate Professor: Academic Pay Level 13A2 (Rs. 139600-211300) with minimum basic pay of Rs.1,39,600/- per month Assistant Professor Grade -I: Academic Pay Level 12 (Rs. 101500-167400) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 1,01,500/- per month Assistant Professor Grade -II: At entry level, may be placed in Academic Pay level 10 (Rs. 57700-98200) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 70900/- per month and shall be moved to Academic Level 11 after completion of one year post Ph.D experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31 July 2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Salary Details 2026
content_sections.text: Professor: Academic Pay Level 14 A (Rs. 159100-220200) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 159100/- per month Associate Professor: Academic Pay Level 13A2 (Rs. 139600-211300) with minimum basic pay of Rs.1,39,600/- per month Assistant Professor Grade -I: Academic Pay Level 12 (Rs. 101500-167400) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 1,01,500/- per month Assistant Professor Grade -II: At entry level, may be placed in Academic Pay level 10 (Rs. 57700-98200) with minimum basic pay of Rs. 70900/- per month and shall be moved to Academic Level 11 after completion of one year post Ph.D experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31 July 2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Jammu Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Jammu Faculty Positions is 31 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Faculty Positions at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent in preceding degrees and a consistently good academic record. Specific experience requirements vary for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT Jammu Faculty Positions is strictly online. No hardcopy or email submissions will be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary is as per the 7th CPC, with pay levels ranging from 10 to 14A. Specific pay scales are detailed for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor (Grade I & II) roles.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, there is 1 vacancy for Faculty Positions at IIT Jammu.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIT Jammu Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves three stages: Shortlisting, Research & Teaching Presentation, and finally, an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IIT Jammu Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: The official website of IIT Jammu is www.iitjammu.ac.in. You can visit it for more information about the institute and its activities.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum experience required for an Assistant Professor Grade-I?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years of relevant industrial, research, or teaching experience is required for the Assistant Professor Grade-I position, excluding the experience gained during Ph.D.
